reference: Hi, your child needs a proper evaluation. She is having a viral pyrexial infection, which often presents with the above complaints. Please show her to a local pediatric specialist who will examine her further and provide you with symptomatic treatment.
text: Hi, the child needs a proper evaluation; she is having a viral bacterial infection, which often presents with the above complaints. Please show her to a local pediatric specialist who will examine her further and provide you with symptomatic treatment.
